recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR and GRI Disclosures by 2026-05-30
recommendations.description: Upgrade FY26 BRSR and GRI disclosures to transparently report solar demand growth and profitability gains, improving ESG ratings and attracting green funds.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹50 Cr potential fund inflow from improved ESG ratings

audit_trail.value: Non-disclosure leads to SEBI scrutiny and cost of capital +20-40 bps
Weak GRI disclosure leads to lower ESG ratings and fund outflow

recommendations.title: Issue ₹100 Cr Green Bond by 2026-12-31
recommendations.description: Leverage the doubled profit and strong solar demand to issue a ₹100 Cr green bond, reducing cost of capital by 30 bps and unlocking ₹3 Cr annual interest savings.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹3 Cr annual interest savings at 30 bps coupon reduction
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance

audit_trail.value: Top opportunity: Issue green bond in next 6-12 months to capitalize on improved profitability
Aligned activities unlock green financing, lower cost of capital

recommendations.title: Refresh Earnings Call Narrative with ESG Profitability Link
recommendations.description: Update the FY26 earnings call script to emphasize the doubling of profit driven by solar demand and highlight ESG initiatives to attract sustainability-focused investors.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential 5-10% P/E multiple uplift from improved ESG narrative

audit_trail.value: Leverage profit momentum to accelerate green bond issuance and strengthen ESG disclosures for investor engagement

recommendations.title: Mobilize Workforce to Scale Solar Capacity by 2027-03-31
recommendations.description: Deploy additional workforce and supply chain resources to capitalize on strong solar demand, targeting ₹50 Cr revenue uplift in FY27 from increased capacity utilization.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹50 Cr revenue uplift FY27 from capacity scaling

audit_trail.value: Strong solar demand unlocking ₹14.4 Cr direct revenue upside
Capacity utilization and workforce mobilization metrics
